nasb.text: And the book of the prophet Isaiah was handed to Him. And He opened the book and found the place where it was written,

esv.text: And the scroll of the prophet Isaiah was given to him. He unrolled the scroll and found the place where it was written,

cnv.text: 有人把以賽亞先知的書遞給他，他展開書卷找到一處，上面寫著：

ccb.text: 有人把以赛亚先知书递给祂，祂打开书卷，找到这样一段经文：

csbs.text: 有人就把先知以赛亚的书递给他。他展开书卷，找到一处，那里写道：
